name: Golf Garage
address: 3336 Grove Rd Suite A, Phoenix, OR 97535
about: Golf Garage is an indoor golf facility in Oregon featuring Foresight Falcon simulators, PGA coaching, and memberships for all skill levels. The facility offers a community-focused environment with tech-equipped bays, a putting simulator, a fitness center, and on-site dining. It is open to the public and provides services including lessons, club fitting, and event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Foresight Falcon simulators with access to 40+ global courses
Tour-level club fitting services using swing and ball flight data analysis
Comprehensive amenities including fitness center, kids lounge, and on-site pub

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food and beverages available at Birdie's Pub
On-site food and beverages available at Birdie's Pub

simulator_hardware.notes: 10 bays available; delivers ball and club performance data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available, though you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers on-site food and beverages at Birdie's Pub.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take about 2-3 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue features a Kids Lounge with games and activities and offers family memberships.
